name: /standards-add: accepts a URL as the first positional argument and writes a STANDARDS-URLS.yaml entry
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-add.sh" https://my-publisher.example.com/guide --id my-publisher-guide --tier 1 --applies-to typescript && grep "https://my-publisher.example.com/guide" .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
